text:
Great question! Unfortunately, the knowledge passages I have on hand don't specifically list the details required to book an HVAC repair session.

I'd hate to give you inaccurate information, so I'd recommend connecting with one of our human agents who can walk you through the exact booking requirements. You can also try our web booking portal for non-emergency appointments.

> ⚠️ **Quick reminder:** If your situation qualifies as an emergency (e.g., no heat below 40°F, burning smell, sparking, etc.), please **call 1-800-555-0190 (24/7)** instead — do NOT use the web portal for emergencies, as a response is not guaranteed through that channel. [source: [faq_emergencies v1.5 §What Counts as an Emergency?]]

Would you like me to help with anything else, or shall I connect you with a team member? 😊
